questionHtml: Sketch the graph of T versus t, clearly indicating any asymptotes with their equations and stating the coordinates of any points of intersection with the axes.
markschemeHtml:
a decreasing exponential         A1

starting at 0, 100 labelled on the graph or stated         A1

T→0 as t→∞         A1

horizontal asymptote T=0 labelled on the graph or stated         A1

 

Note: Award A0 for stating y=0 as the horizontal asymptote.

 

[4 marks]
